git.push.long: Uploads your local code changes to GitHub so others can see them

git.pull.long: Downloads the newest code changes that other people made

git.commit.long: Creates a permanent record of the current state of your code

git.add.long: Marks files to be included in the next save point

git.status.long: Shows which files have been modified since the last save

git.diff.long: Shows exactly what lines were added or removed

git.log.long: Shows a timeline of all past code saves

git.checkout.long: Moves to a different version of the project

git.merge.long: Merges two different versions of the project together

git.clone.long: Creates a local copy of a project from the internet

git.stash.long: Puts current work aside so you can do something else first

git.rebase.long: Rearranges the order of code saves for a cleaner timeline

git.fetch.long: Looks for new changes on the server without applying them yet

git.blame.long: Shows which person last edited each line of a file

npm.install.long: Downloads code libraries that the project depends on

npm.test.long: Executes automated checks to make sure nothing is broken

npm.build.long: Compiles and optimizes the project for deployment

npm.start.long: Launches the application in development mode

npm.run.long: Executes a predefined task from the project's configuration

npm.audit.long: Scans all packages for known security vulnerabilities

pip.install.long: Downloads a Python library from the package index

pip.freeze.long: Shows all Python packages and their versions

docker.build.long: Packages the app into a portable container that runs anywhere

docker.run.long: Launches an app inside an isolated container environment

docker.push.long: Uploads the container image to a registry for deployment

docker.compose.long: Orchestrates multiple containers that work together

cargo.build.long: Converts Rust source code into a runnable program

cargo.test.long: Runs the automated test suite for Rust code

cargo.clippy.long: Checks Rust code for common mistakes and style issues

tsc.long: Converts TypeScript code into JavaScript that browsers can run

eslint.long: Scans code for style violations and potential errors

prettier.long: Automatically fixes code formatting for consistency

jest.long: Executes JavaScript test suites to verify code behavior

pytest.long: Executes Python test suites with detailed reporting

vitest.long: Fast test runner designed for Vite-based projects

curl.long: Sends a request to a website or API and shows the response

make.long: Executes build instructions defined in a Makefile

kubectl.get.long: Shows what's running in the cloud cluster

kubectl.apply.long: Sends configuration to the cloud cluster to update services
